title: Arcane Armor Trims
description: A micro addon for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks that bridges the gap between ISS materials and Minecraft's armor trim system.
body:
# Arcane Armor Trims

A micro addon for [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) that bridges the gap between ISS materials and Minecraft's armor trim system.

Simply use ingots from ISS as trim materials at a smithing table; that's it!

![Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5202536b1d8ed51c4f92467b39e849497cdbf3d.png)

## Current Materials
- **Pyrium Ingot**
- **Mithril Ingot**
- **Arcane Ingot**

![Example Of Trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff76d17a6062a8d8d2e6d15dc4c31b5d74e19d32.png)

## Notes
> There are currently no plans to add custom trim patterns or to add vanilla trim compatibility to existing ISS armor.
> For contact, reach out to @mistermarlow on Discord!

## Requirements
- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks!

**Coming Soon**
- Forge compatability

**Known Issues**
- Trim colors incorrectly displaying color in inventory slots, just a Minecraft 1.21.1 issue.
